content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 TELUS Digital: Quality Assurance Rater - German (Germany) Anywhere in the World 🇩🇪 Germany Nevada Keyword Research and Communication Skills All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2702/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Las Vegas, Nevada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence">https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence</a> </p> <p>Join our elite team of Senior Raters as a critical contributor to high-quality validation data that directly influences product development and quality assurance for leading search engines and AI technologies.</p> <p>This flexible, remote opportunity allows you to apply your analytical and research skills to evaluate search results and AI-generated content while contributing to the development of high-quality AI systems.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>A Day in the Life of a Quality Assurance Rater</strong></p> <p>In this role, you'll conduct analytical assessments of search results and AI responses, providing ratings and feedback that help improve AI model performance and search quality.</p> <p>Your work will maintain high quality standards and deliver the accuracy our clients depend on.</p> <p>You'll evaluate a variety of rating tasks, analyze content with attention to detail, conduct research to support rating decisions, and identify guideline gaps or task inconsistencies.</p> <p>You'll also participate in training and calibration sessions while contributing feedback to improve rating processes and guidelines.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Evaluate search results and AI-generated content for quality, relevance, accuracy, and usefulness.</li> <li>Conduct online research to verify information and support rating decisions.</li> <li>Apply rating guidelines consistently while maintaining quality standards.</li> <li>Document edge cases, guideline gaps, and task-related issues.</li> <li>Provide clear written feedback and rationale for ratings when required.</li> <li>Participate in training, calibration sessions, and ongoing quality reviews.</li> <li>Meet productivity expectations while maintaining high-quality work.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>The hourly earnings for this role are 20.60 EUR per hour, payment is based on completed tasks.</p> <h4 class="sui-font-heading sui-text-h2 tw-font-bold sui-text-darkGray-darker tw-mb-1">Qualification path</h4> <p class="sui-text-b3 sui-text-darkGray-darker ql-editor">&nbsp;</p> <p>Candidates will complete project-specific training and qualification assessments before joining the program. Ongoing work will be subject to regular quality assurance reviews and performance monitoring.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Basic Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li>Working as a freelancer with excellent communication skills in German &amp; English.</li> <li>Resident in Germany for the last 5 consecutive years.</li> <li>Familiarity with current and historical business, media, sports, news, social media, and cultural affairs.</li> <li>Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and research skills.</li> <li>Experience using web browsers, search engines, and online research tools.</li> <li>Daily access to a reliable broadband internet connection, smartphone, and personal computer.</li> <li>Demonstrated research capability through professional background OR strong track record of self-directed research and information verification</li> <li>Ability to work independently and follow detailed guidelines consistently.</li> <li>High level of creativity and logical skills with the ability to achieve consistent targets</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in quality assurance, content moderation, data annotation, research, journalism, editing, or information verification.</li> <li>Familiarity with AI technologies, search engines, and digital content ecosystems.</li> <li>Subject matter expertise in areas such as Popular Culture, Social Sciences, STEM, Medicine, Law, Finance, or Engineering.</li> <li>Additional language skills may be beneficial depending on project requirements.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Equal Opportunity</strong></p> <p>All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-quality-assurance-rater-german-germany">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-quality-assurance-rater-german-germany</a></p> Thu, 11 Jun 2026 12:01:10 +0000 Sat, 11 Jul 2026 12:01:10 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-quality-assurance-rater-german-germany https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-quality-assurance-rater-german-germany The Legal Podcast Network : We're Hiring: Appointment Setter (Freelance, Remote) Anywhere in the World Texas Cold Calling and Lead Generation Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5513/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Austin, Texas <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.thelegalpodcastnetwork.com">http://www.thelegalpodcastnetwork.com</a> </p> <p>Let’s keep this simple.</p> <p>We help attorneys become the obvious experts in their market by giving them their own professional podcast.</p> <p>They talk. We handle everything else.</p> <p>We also have one rule that matters: one attorney per practice area per market. No clones. No internal competition. Just clear authority.</p> <p>We’re growing quickly and looking for an Appointment Setter who knows how to start conversations, follow up consistently, and book calls.</p> <p>What You’ll Be Doing</p> <ul class="_296098d5 _3969a26e"> <li>This is a 40-hour-a-week position.
